message:
bench(quantile_sketch): 31 benchmarks for TDigest streaming quantile sketch

9 groups: insert, insert_throughput, quantile, cdf, merge,
compression_sensitivity, stats, clear_reuse, mean. Key results:
- insert: ~22-26ns amortised (budget <50ns)
- quantile p50: ~305ns, p99: ~353ns (budget <1us)
- CDF: ~77-132ns (budget <1us)
- merge 10K each: ~2.5us (budget <50us)
- 10K insert throughput: ~368us (budget <500us)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,6 +18,7 @@ workspace = true
 [dependencies]
 serde.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true
+tokio.workspace = true
 thiserror.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
 tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
@@ -111,9 +112,10 @@ fastembed = { version = "5.11", optional = true }
 rmp-serde = { version = "1.3", optional = true }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
+tokio = { workspace = true, features = ["test-util"] }
 proptest = "1.8.0"
 tempfile = "3.23.0"
-criterion = "0.7.0"
+criterion = { version = "0.7.0", features = ["async_tokio"] }
 loom = "0.7"
 rcgen = { workspace = true }
 
@@ -435,6 +437,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "token_bucket_bench"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "quantile_sketch_bench"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
